items.title: Modi Seizes AI Summit to Assert India’s Global Ambitions After Tough Year
items.description: Two months into the new year, he’s secured major trade pacts with the European Union and the US, will host several foreign leaders in the coming weeks who want to clinch their own deals, is riding a wave of popular support following key state elections, and his top officials expect economic growth will beat the government’s own forecasts.  This week, Modi will have an opportunity to showcase not only India’s global ambitions but also his own resurgence when he takes the stage at a high profile artificial intelligence summit in New Delhi.  In attendance at the India AI Impact Summit will be more than a dozen heads of state, including from France and Brazil, and some of the most influential leaders in the tech world — from OpenAI’s Sam Altman to Sundar Pichai of Alphabet Inc. to Anthropic PBC’s Dario Amodei.

items.title: FDIS: Consumer Discretionary Dashboard For February
items.description: Consumer services look 14% undervalued with strong quality, while autos/components are most overpriced. Read here for an analysis of FDIS ETF.

items.title: Oracle Surges 12% While Apple, Amazon Tumble in Choppy Tech Week
items.description: Tech stocks delivered a choppy week, with the sector’s biggest names diverging sharply as AI spending debates intensified and bear market territory claimed two Magnificent Seven members. Incredibly, every single Magnificent 7 stock is now down year-to-date after NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) shares slipped 2.23% on Friday. Let’s dive into the biggest storylines in technology this week. While many stocks ... Oracle Surges 12% While Apple, Amazon Tumble in Choppy Tech Week

items.title: DXC’s Enterprise AI Push Tests Whether New Capabilities Can Revive Growth
items.description: DXC Technology has completed a global deployment of Amazon Quick across its operations. The company has launched a dedicated Amazon Quick-focused AI implementation unit, the DXC Amazon Quick Practice. DXC has opened an AI-focused Customer Experience Center in London to showcase and test enterprise AI use cases. The firm has expanded its PoloWorks partnership with new AI-enabled platforms, including the Assure platform for insurance clients. DXC Technology (NYSE:DXC) is pushing into...
